Package index

Dataset metadata

list_datasets() allDatasets()
Retrieve Dataset Catalog Metadata from a Specified Database
get_dataset_metadata() datasetInfo() getDatasetMetadata()
Retrieve Dataset Metadata by CMID

Search and translation

get_cmid_info() CMIDinfo()
Retrieve Details for a Specific CMID (CatMapperID)
search_database()
Search
translate_rows()
Translate

Merge and join

get_merge_template()
Retrieve a Merging Template for a Dataset
get_merge_template_summary()
Retrieve a Merge-Template Summary for a MERGING or STACK Node
build_merge_syntax()
Generate Merge Syntax Files from a Merging Template
getMergingTemplate()
Retrieve a Downloadable Merging Template
getMergingTemplateSummary()
Retrieve a Merging Template Summary
findMergingTemplate()
Find and Classify a Merging Template
downloadMergingTemplateWorkbook()
Download a Merging Template Workbook
downloadLinkFileWorkbook()
Download a Link-File Workbook
generateMergeFiles()
Generate Merge Files
downloadMergeZip()
Download a Generated Merge Zip Archive
propose_merge_links() createLinkfile()
Create Linkfile from Dataset CMIDs
join_datasets()
Join Datasets by Key

Edit and upload

upload_rows()
Upload Edit Rows to CatMapper
prepare_upload_rows()
Prepare Upload Payload Components
uploadInputNodes()
Upload Edit-Page Rows to CatMapper
uploadInputNodesStatus()
Get Upload Task Status
waitForUploadTask()
Wait For Upload Task Completion
updateWaitingUSES()
Refresh Waiting USES Queue
submitEditUpload()
Submit Edit Upload and Refresh Queue
build_key()
Build CatMapper Key Expressions
build_key_from_columns()
Build Row-Wise Composite Key Column From Source Columns
normalize_key()
Normalize Key Expressions
is_normalized_key()
Check Whether Keys Are Normalized

Metadata introspection

get_domains() getDomains()
Retrieve Domain Metadata from a Specified Database
get_upload_properties()
Retrieve Upload Property Metadata from a Specified Database
get_properties()
Retrieve Property Metadata from a Specified Database
